zh.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devonshir: 英國戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Ferrers於大約1277年出生在英國戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通時，他的父親William IV De Ferrers53歲，母親Isolda de Cardinham49歲。他與Alice de Boson結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1309年3月18日在英國英格蘭戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯享年33歲。

zh-hans.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devonshir: 英国戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Ferrers于大约1277年出生在英国戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通时，他的父亲William IV De Ferrers53岁，母亲Isolda de Cardinham49岁。他与Alice de Boson结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1309年3月18日在英国英格兰戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Ferrers was born about 1277, in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England, his father, William IV De Ferrers, was 53 and his mother, Isolda de Cardinham, was 49. He married Alice de Boson. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 18 March 1309, in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

ko.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devonshir: 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William IV De Ferrers(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda de Cardinham(은)는 49세였다. 그는 Alice de Boson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1309년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 c후르스턴 페레르스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devonshir: бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Ferrers родился около 1277 г. в местности бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William IV De Ferrers было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Isolda de Cardinham, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Boson. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 18 марта 1309 г. в местности чурстон фиррирс, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
